protein_name: Binds to membranes enriched in phosphatidylinositol 4,5-bisphosphate (PtdIns(4,5)P2). Modifies membrane curvature and facilitates the formation of clathrin-coated invaginations. Regulates receptor-mediated endocytosis. Belongs to the epsin family. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: clathrin vesicle coat; clathrin-coated pit; cytoplasm; cytosol; endosome; nucleus; plasma membrane
raw_fields.Molecular Function: clathrin binding; lipid binding; molecular sequestering activity; phospholipid binding; protein binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: endocytosis; negative regulation of sprouting angiogenesis
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: EH domain-binding mitotic phosphoprotein; EPN1; EPS-15-interacting protein 1; epsin 1; Epsin-1
